rows.description: I certify that the accounts of the College are the Abstracts and Balance Sheet contain a true of the College.
rows.notes: Adopted description and notes from gemini-flash, as its reasoning for grammatical awkwardness and an obscured word ('true') is visually consistent. gpt-5-mini's reading of 'contained in' is less accurate. Visual confirmation shows text is mostly clear but one word is very difficult to discern.
rows.english_description: Attestation that the college accounts, abstracts, and balance sheet present a true record.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Attestation that the college accounts, abstracts, and balance sheet present a true record; no monetary amount stated.
